title: Takken8 infinite loading after ranked rematch
summary: Players report the rematch screen freezing at 100% after online matches. Restarting the client or clearing cache temporarily gets around the hang.
content: This bug report was published immediately after multiple live player reports for Takken8.
Players describe the game locking on the rematch loading screen after ranked matches, especially when re-entering a lobby without closing the client.
Current workarounds include restarting the game between matches, clearing the local cache, and avoiding back-to-back rematches until the next patch lands.
metaTitle: Takken8 infinite loading after ranked rematch
metaDescription: Players report the rematch screen freezing at 100% after online matches. Restarting the client or clearing cache temporarily gets around the hang.

title: Game crashes to desktop after parachute landing on Erangel
summary: AI suggestions point to memory spikes in high density landing zones. Players are avoiding early crashes by switching shadows to medium and disabling replays before queueing.
content: This live report is scheduled for 15:00 PKT PKT and targets PUBG, GTA 5.

AI suggestions reviewed Game crashes to desktop after parachute landing on Erangel; Invisible wall collision bug near Pochinki church; Looting animation stuck when picking up M416 with backpack full and summarized the most relevant community fixes for publication.
The post is structured for search indexing so players can discover the latest issue summary from search engines.
metaTitle: Game crashes to desktop after parachute landing on Erangel
metaDescription: AI suggestions point to memory spikes in high density landing zones. Players are avoiding early crashes by switching shadows to medium and disabling replays before queueing.

title: Takken8 input delay on training mode
summary: Players are noticing delayed button response in training mode, especially after pausing and resuming. Restarting the lobby appears to reduce the lag for some users.
content: This bug report was published immediately for Takken8 after several live player clips showed delayed movement and attacks in training mode.
The input delay seems more noticeable after pausing, returning to the menu, or switching controllers without restarting the game.
Current workarounds include restarting the training session, reconnecting the controller, and avoiding repeated pause cycles until the next update.
metaTitle: Takken8 input delay on training mode
metaDescription: Players are noticing delayed button response in training mode, especially after pausing and resuming. Restarting the lobby appears to reduce the lag for some users.

title: Takken8 audio stutter after character select
summary: Some players hear a short audio stutter and desync after choosing a character on the versus screen. Changing the output device once before queueing helps a few setups.
content: This bug report was published immediately for Takken8 after multiple reports of audio crackle and frame drops when the versus screen loads.
The stutter is most noticeable after character select and may continue into the opening round if the match is queued immediately.
Players are temporarily switching output devices or restarting the client before rematching to reduce the problem.
metaTitle: Takken8 audio stutter after character select
metaDescription: Some players hear a short audio stutter and desync after choosing a character on the versus screen. Changing the output device once before queueing helps a few setups.

title: Takken8 loading screen softlock after ranked queue
summary: Players are reporting a softlock on the loading screen after queued ranked matches. Waiting for the timeout or restarting the app clears it for most users.
content: This bug report was prepared from live player reports around the ranked queue loading screen in Takken8.
The freeze appears after selecting a ranked match and can leave the client stuck before the stage loads.
Reported workarounds include waiting for the timeout, restarting the app, and avoiding queueing immediately after a long session.
metaTitle: Takken8 loading screen softlock after ranked queue
metaDescription: Players are reporting a softlock on the loading screen after queued ranked matches. Waiting for the timeout or restarting the app clears it for most users.
